title: Number of islands
hints: Use BFS or DFS to traverse all connected 1's starting from each unvisited 1.
Mark visited cells to avoid counting the same island multiple times.
Check all 8 directions (including diagonals) from each cell.
Each time you find an unvisited 1, start a new BFS/DFS to mark all connected 1's.
Count the number of times you start a new traversal - that's the number of islands.
